visual_description: An older man in a suit smiles while speaking on a phone in a dimly lit room with metal bars, while several other men sit or stand nearby. The camera then focuses on a man with dark hair and a mustache looking through the bars, his face partially illuminated. Finally, a hand grips the metal bars and another man in a suit stands with his hand near his face.
